sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54723" key="kataparmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατα-παρμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">καταπείρω</etym>) <sense id="n54723.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">piercing, boring</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:62" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.62</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
